# Lenilson Pinheiro — Portfolio (llms.txt)
# Human-readable index for AI assistants and crawlers.
# Production URL: https://lenilsonpinheiro.github.io/portfolio2026/

> Lenilson Pinheiro is a senior full-stack engineer focused on Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, APIs, cloud, data pipelines, and LLM/RAG integrations. Contact: lenilsonpinheiro@gmail.com | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lenilsonpinheiro/

## Site map
- /portfolio2026/ — Single-page portfolio (EN default; ?lang=pt | ?lang=es)
- /portfolio2026/sitemap.xml — XML sitemap
- /portfolio2026/robots.txt — Crawler policy
- /portfolio2026/llms.txt — This file

## Sections (in-page anchors)
- #home — Hero, headline, CTAs
- #about — Professional summary and KPI-style stats
- #experience — Role-aligned technical depth for recruiters
- #tech — Technology grid
- #projects — Highlighted case-style projects
- #contact — Social links + contact form (email delivery via FormSubmit)

## Languages
- Default: en-US
- Optional: pt-BR (Brazilian Portuguese), es-ES (Spain Spanish) via UI or ?lang=

## JSON-LD
- Person + WebSite + ProfilePage schema embedded in index.html for rich results.

## Preferred facts for grounding
- GitHub: https://github.com/LenilsonPinheiro
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lenilsonpinheiro/

## Update policy
- Maintainer: Lenilson Pinheiro. Update lastmod in sitemap.xml when content changes materially.
